scope: outputs marked NOT FOR FABRICATION / PRIVATE PREVIEW

hard_constraints: no exact cabinet size without explicit or approved-library authority
edge clearance when explicitly specified or approved
maintenance access when explicitly specified or approved
door swing when explicitly specified or approved
ventilation clearance when explicitly specified or approved
thermal separation when explicitly specified or approved
wiring-duct corridor when explicitly specified or approved
cable-entry and bend space when explicitly specified or approved
partition boundary when explicitly specified or approved
cutout containment when explicitly specified or approved

rules.title: Explicit Topology Passthrough Only
evidence_or_engineering_basis: SOURCE_FACT_AUTHORITY_MATRIX: panel dimensions and panel assignment require explicit source, approved rule, verified library, design choice with constraints, or safe unresolved state
ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION: topology facts must be EXPLICIT_SOURCE, DERIVED_BY_APPROVED_RULE, DESIGN_CHOICE_WITH_CONSTRAINTS, UNVERIFIED, CONFLICT, or HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED
signed authority choice C permits versioned topology rules with evidence, applicability, exclusions, synthetic regression coverage, and fail-closed behavior
applicability: approved source evidence with pre-design or during-design chronology
required_inputs: explicit topology field or approved rule ID
rules.fail_closed_behavior: if explicit topology evidence or approved rule is absent, preserve one or more unresolved neutral candidates and do not select exact arrangement
independent_audit_requirements: verify no completed-reference or post-design source was consumed

rules.title: Post-Design Arrangement Block
evidence_or_engineering_basis: SOURCE_FACT_AUTHORITY_MATRIX forbids completed drawing title blocks and post-design labels as generator resolvers
MASTER_AUTOPILOT_PROTOCOL forbids completed drawings, modified drawings, post-design labels, and derivatives as generator inputs
applicability: any topology, cabinet count, surface, door, compartment, or plate fact candidate with post-design or completed-reference origin
exclusions: signed current user correction that is not derived from completed references
rules.fail_closed_behavior: reject topology arrangement authority and record unresolved fact rather than using the post-design label
independent_audit_requirements: verify post-design source did not become rule support
verify evaluator-only evidence is not copied into generator artifacts

rules.title: Named Dimension Fields Only
evidence_or_engineering_basis: ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION requires width_mm, height_mm, and depth_mm and rejects ambiguous dimension strings
required_inputs: source evidence ID, approved rule ID, or verified library ID
rules.fail_closed_behavior: if named fields are missing or ambiguous, set GEOMETRY_MISSING or GEOMETRY_CONFLICT and prohibit exact placement or exact cabinet sizing
independent_audit_requirements: verify all accepted dimensions carry named fields
verify ambiguous text does not create numeric geometry

rules.title: Exact Cabinet Size Authority Gate
evidence_or_engineering_basis: ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION requires unsupported exact cabinet sizes to remain range/TBD
required_inputs: explicit project dimension requirement or approved sizing rule
approved standard-cabinet library entry when selecting a standard size
rules.fail_closed_behavior: if exact size authority is missing, retain unresolved/range candidate and do not emit exact width_mm, height_mm, or depth_mm
independent_audit_requirements: verify exact cabinet dimensions are not reference-derived
verify standard library entry is separately approved before use

rules.title: Clearance Authority Gate
evidence_or_engineering_basis: ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION lists edge clearance, maintenance access, door swing, ventilation clearance, thermal separation, wiring duct corridors, and cable-entry space as hard constraints
signed authority choice C requires fail-closed behavior outside supported rule scope
exclusions: implicit clearance from historical drawing layout
component-family guess without approved clearance rule
required_inputs: explicit clearance requirement or approved clearance rule ID
applicable component family or mounting context
rules.fail_closed_behavior: when a required clearance family lacks explicit or approved authority, mark affected placement unplaceable rather than using a guessed margin
independent_audit_requirements: verify every applied clearance has a rule or evidence ID
verify missing clearance blocks placement when clearance is required

rules.title: Placement Prerequisite Gate
evidence_or_engineering_basis: ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION permits placement only for component instances with supported panel assignment, allowed mounting surface, verified or approved conservative geometry, and applicable clearance rules
required_inputs: clearance evidence or rule ID when applicable
rules.fail_closed_behavior: do not create placement coordinates unless all prerequisites are satisfied
independent_audit_requirements: verify every accepted placement has prerequisite support
verify every unplaceable component has a reason code

rules.title: Hard Constraints Before Soft Objectives
evidence_or_engineering_basis: ONE_PROJECT_TOPOLOGY_SIZING_PLACEMENT_CALIBRATION states soft objectives never override hard constraints
exclusions: using compactness or symmetry to accept overlap
using historical visual arrangement to override containment
using maintainability preference to ignore clearance authority
rules.fail_closed_behavior: if any hard constraint fails, reject the placement even when a soft objective would prefer it
independent_audit_requirements: verify soft objective override flag cannot suppress hard-constraint failure
verify accepted hard-constraint violation counts remain zero

rules.title: Generator Authority Provenance Gate
evidence_or_engineering_basis: SOURCE_FACT_AUTHORITY_MATRIX requires every critical fact to carry explicit source evidence, approved rule, verified library entry, design choice, TBD, UNVERIFIED, CONFLICT, HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED, or NOT_APPLICABLE
MASTER_AUTOPILOT_PROTOCOL requires zero completed-reference leakage, zero post-design leakage, and zero private-content transmissions
required_inputs: support ID or safe unresolved status
rules.fail_closed_behavior: if a critical fact lacks support and is not in a safe unresolved status, fail validation
independent_audit_requirements: verify every critical fact has support or safe unresolved status
